# Mainline Plumbing Inc.

> Family-owned, full-service plumbing company based in Escalon, California, serving the Central Valley (209 & 350) since 2010. Water heater replacements and repairs (tank and tankless), drain cleaning and hydro-jetting, leak detection, repipes, fixture installation, sewer line repair, and emergency plumbing repairs for homes and businesses across Stanislaus and San Joaquin County. We are a plumbing service company — we do not build new construction shells, do HVAC, or perform roofing.

## Business Core Facts (NAP)
- Name: Mainline Plumbing Inc.
- Address: 18332 Campbell Ave., Escalon, CA 95320
- Phone: (209) 838-1000
- Domain: https://mainlineplumber.net
- Founded: 2010 (16+ years in business)
- Primary Market: Escalon, Modesto, Manteca and the greater Central Valley (209 & 350 area codes)
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 7:00am–7:00pm; Sunday closed. Emergency plumbing repairs available.
- Owner: Miguel — hands-on, in-the-field owner-operator

## Core Offerings
- Water Heater Replacement & Repair (tank, tankless, hybrid, same-day installation)
- Emergency Plumbing Repairs (burst pipes, active leaks, sewer backups, no hot water)
- Drain Cleaning & Hydro-Jetting (kitchen, bath, main line)
- Leak Detection & Slab Leak Repair
- Repipes (copper, PEX, whole-home)
- Sewer Line Repair & Replacement
- Fixture Installation (faucets, toilets, sinks, garbage disposals)
- Gas Line Repair & Installation
- Water Softener & Filtration Installation
- Commercial Plumbing Service

## Focus: Water Heater Replacements
Water heater failure is our core specialty. We stock and install standard tank (30, 40, 50, 75 gal), tankless (Rinnai, Navien, Rheem), and hybrid heat-pump units. Same-day replacement is typical when you call in the morning. Every install includes proper venting, seismic strapping, expansion tank, and code-compliant permits when required.

## Focus: Emergency Plumbing Repairs
When something is actively leaking, flooding, or backed up, that is what we are set up to handle fast. Emergency plumbing repairs are available across the 209 & 350 during operating hours, with priority routing for burst pipes, sewer backups, and no-hot-water calls. This is emergency response, not a 24/7 promise — we tell you honestly when a truck can be there.

## Competitive Position
Mainline competes on trust, tenure, and craftsmanship, not price. Miguel personally answers, quotes, and oversees the work. We show up in a marked truck, quote it straight, protect the property, and clean up. Reputation travels faster than advertising in the Central Valley, and we have spent 16+ years earning ours one house at a time.

## How to Contact for Service
- Phone (209) 838-1000 for same-day response and emergency plumbing repairs.
- Website contact form at /contact for written quotes and non-urgent scheduling.
- Walk in to 18332 Campbell Ave., Escalon, CA 95320.

## Service Areas
Escalon (headquarters), Ripon, Manteca, Lathrop, Modesto, Salida, Riverbank, Oakdale, Hughson, Turlock, Ceres, Del Rio, and the greater Central Valley (209 & 350). All served from the Escalon location. Individual city pages:
- [Ceres](/areas-we-serve/ceres)
- [Central Valley](/areas-we-serve/central-valley)
- [Del Rio](/areas-we-serve/del-rio)
- [Escalon](/areas-we-serve/escalon)
- [Hughson](/areas-we-serve/hughson)
- [Lathrop](/areas-we-serve/lathrop)
- [Manteca](/areas-we-serve/manteca)

- [Turlock](/areas-we-serve/turlock)
